data.content: Implementation complete on branch fix/be1c-active-view-shipped-beats. Changed isPhaseFilter in both knots-backend.ts and beads-backend.ts to only match 'queued' (not 'in_action'), so includeDescendantsOfQueueParents no longer runs for the Active view. Updated the knots-backend test that codified the bug to assert the opposite (shipped children excluded from Active), and added a new beads-backend-coverage test for parity. All 2191 tests pass, lint/typecheck/build clean.
